result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 4:   AND createddate >= DATE '2022-08-16'
                          ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT issueid__c AS issue_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(orderitemid__c, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
  AND createddate >= DATE '2022-08-16'
  AND createddate <  DATE '2023-01-16'
  AND issueid__c IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY issueid__c
ORDER BY case_count DESC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT issueid__c AS issue_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(orderitemid__c, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
  AND createddate >= DATE '2022-08-16'
  AND createddate <  DATE '2023-01-16'
  AND issueid__c IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY issueid__c
ORDER BY case_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT issueid__c AS issue_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(orderitemid__c, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
  AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-08-16 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-01-16 00:00:00'
  AND issueid__c IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY issueid__c
ORDER BY case_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cases,
       SUM(CASE WHEN orderitemid__c IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_orderitem,
       SUM(CASE WHEN issueid__c IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_issue
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-08-16 00:00:00'
  AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-01-16 00:00:00';

result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT Id, Product2Id
FROM OrderItem
WHERE regexp_replace(Id, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
   OR regexp_replace(Product2Id, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
LIMIT 20;': no such function: regexp_replace"

args.query:
SELECT Id, Product2Id
FROM OrderItem
WHERE regexp_replace(Id, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
   OR regexp_replace(Product2Id, '^#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
SELECT Id, Product2Id
FROM OrderItem
WHERE REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
   OR REPLACE(Product2Id, '#', '') = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'
LIMIT 50;

args.query:
SELECT issueid__c AS issue_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(orderitemid__c, '^#', '') IN (
    SELECT regexp_replace(id, '^#', '')
    FROM (
        SELECT '#802Wt00000790WEIAY'::text AS id
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt0000078wz5IAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt0000078xAAIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt0000078yXgIAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt0000078yXiIAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt0000078ypSIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt000007906mIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000792gDIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000792zTIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt0000079315IAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000793sTIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000794F3IAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000794F4IAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000794JmIAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000794YFIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000794YJIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000794bTIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000794bXIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt000007959OIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt000007959PIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000795PSIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000795UKIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000795akIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000795ywIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt000007962JIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt000007968hIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt000007968iIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796F5IAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000796IIIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000796N7IAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796NAIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796RzIAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796S0IAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796S1IAI'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796VDIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796YPIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796YQIAY'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796a1IAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796dFIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000796dIIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '#802Wt00000796jiIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796lKIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796myIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796n0IAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796oaIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796rlIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796tTIAQ'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796v0IAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796wbIAA'
        UNION ALL SELECT '802Wt00000796wcIAA'
    ) t
)
AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-08-16 00:00:00'
AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-01-16 00:00:00'
GROUP BY issueid__c
ORDER BY case_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
